text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh... I'm really, really, really sorry! I lost the
race...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I g-gave it my best shot, but I couldn't move the
way I wanted.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It was only for a second, but... I thought this was
the end for me.
choice_data_list: You know what you have to do.
You know what you have to do.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I do... the fact I was about to lose hope is what I
hate more than anything!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I want to run properly... I need to get...
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I don't want to give up like this! I... Sniff! I!
choice_data_list: Your persistence is one of your strengths.
Your persistence is one of your strengths.
Crying won't make you any stronger!
Crying won't make you any stronger!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I don't want to give up like this! I... Sniff! I!
choice_data_list: Your persistence is one of your strengths.
Your persistence is one of your strengths.
Crying won't make you any stronger!
Crying won't make you any stronger!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! If that's true, that makes me... happy...
Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! Guh, T-Trainer! I won't give up, I p-pwomise!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes! I promise I'll work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm a total klutz, always making mistakes, but I
still want to win!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll train more, and after that, I'll... I'll...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I u-understand, I won't give in halfway! Please,
d-do your worst!
